introSection: Little Dipper is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by the American manufacturer Allan Herschell Company located at Midway State Park in Bemus Point, New York, USA.

sections.title: Color scheme
sections.content: Black track and supports, used to be black track with red and blue supports.

fullText:
Little Dipper is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by the American manufacturer Allan Herschell Company located at Midway State Park in Bemus Point, New York, USA.



Black track and supports, used to be black track with red and blue supports.
